question.label: Reorg shift
question.name: You mentioned 'the shift since the reorg' — what feels most different now?
question.description: Drills into the specific change she named so the manager understands what shifted in practice.

answer: I have been quieter in leadership meetings because I am still figuring out where my voice has most leverage.

assessment.note: She names uncertainty about where her voice has leverage after the reorg, a strong clarity gap with mild strain from pulling back in leadership forums.

new_queue.label: Voice leverage
new_queue.name: When you say 'where my voice has most leverage' — what feels unclear there?

new_queue.label: Arrival context
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately?

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?

new_queue.label: Load pressure
new_queue.name: What part of your current load is hardest to keep in balance?

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: Where would a bit more support make the biggest difference right now?

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have changed by our next conversation?

history.answer_excerpt: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I have been quieter in leadership meetings because I am still figuring out where my voice has most leverage.
